key_components: FullRenderer struct with width: u16 field
Helper functions: dice_glyph(), moon_glyph(), format_duration(), dithered_line()
CardRenderer trait implementation: render_section_header(), render_card_row(), render_progress(), render_footer()
Comprehensive unit test module (26k+ chars of tests)

patterns_discovered.name: Unicode Visual Encoding
patterns_discovered.description: Heavy use of Unicode box/dither glyphs for demoscene aesthetic
examples: ◔◑◕● for moon quarter phase progress (U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF)

patterns_discovered.name: 256-Color ANSI with Helpers
patterns_discovered.description: Centralized color code generation via state_ansi() from colors module

patterns_discovered.name: Terminal Width Adaptation
patterns_discovered.description: dithered_line() utility fills header/footer to exact terminal width
patterns_discovered.logic: prefix_len + fill_len = width; fill_len = width.saturating_sub(prefix_len); fill = '░'.repeat(fill_len)

patterns_discovered.name: Progress Bar Encoding
patterns_discovered.description: 16-cell bar with U+2588 (full block) and U+2591 (light shade)

patterns_discovered.name: Human-Readable Duration Formatting
patterns_discovered.logic: if secs >= 60 { format!('{}m{:02}s', secs/60, secs%60) } else { format!('{}s', secs) }

patterns_discovered.name: Structured Row Composition
patterns_discovered.description: render_card_row() builds parts vec and joins with '  ' separator

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Unicode character counting vs byte length
gotchas_discovered.issue: String.len() counts bytes; .chars().count() counts logical characters. dithered_line() uses .chars().count() for terminal width calculations.
gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical for proper header fill alignment with multi-byte Unicode glyphs

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: ANSI escape sequences are invisible but take terminal column space in callers
gotchas_discovered.issue: render_section_header() returns colored output with \x1b[38;5;NNNm codes that don't occupy visible columns but output contains them
gotchas_discovered.impact: Layout must handle ANSI in output but calculate widths on visible chars only (already done via dithered_line logic)

gotchas_discovered.issue: Long labels could cause width.saturating_sub(prefix_len) → 0 or negative fill, risking panic
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: saturating_sub() prevents underflow; tested with width=40/80/120

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Dice glyph only rendered for Some(priority)
gotchas_discovered.issue: None priority must be explicitly omitted from row output, not rendered as fallback
Fraction ranges (< 0.25, < 0.50, < 0.75, ≥ 0.75) must partition [0,1] correctly to avoid undefined behavior
gotchas_discovered.test_coverage: Tests verify all 4 glyphs render correctly

completed_features: Section headers with dithered ░▒▓ pattern filled to terminal width
Card rows with color-coded left accent ▌ stripe and state markers (▶✓✗·)
Progress bar with 16-cell filled/empty blocks + percentage
Moon quarter glyph ◔◑◕● for phase progress
Footer with dithered pattern and success rate/avg duration stats
assertions_verify: ANSI escape sequences present in colored output
Unicode glyphs render at expected positions
Width-adaptive fill calculation (dither count scales with width)
Card view field rendering (title, provider, elapsed, progress, exit code)

recommendations.suggestion: Extract dithered_line() to a shared utility module (e.g., render::utils) if CompactRenderer or TinyRenderer will reuse it
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation is self-contained; refactor on third usage

recommendations.suggestion: Consider caching state_ansi() color codes per state in a lazy_static or Arc<HashMap>
recommendations.rationale: Each render_section_header() / render_card_row() call recomputes ANSI codes; repeated calls for many cards could benefit from memoization

recommendations.suggestion: Add integration tests rendering actual CardView collections to verify multi-row layout and section grouping
recommendations.rationale: Unit tests verify individual components; missing end-to-end layout test for canvas composition

recommendations.suggestion: Document Unicode glyph fallbacks for terminals without box-drawing support
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation assumes U+2500–U+259F block elements; some terminals may need ASCII alternates (-, +, *, etc.)

recommendations.suggestion: Establish FullRenderer as the feature-complete baseline; CompactRenderer should suppress dice/moon glyphs and dithering, TinyRenderer should use ASCII only
recommendations.rationale: Spec mentions 3 levels (Tiny, Compact, Full); Full is now defined; allows incremental descent
